title: cylindropuntia teres
intro: Cylindropuntia teres, also known as the beavertail cholla, is a species of cactus native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, due to its ability to treat various health issues. The beavertail cholla is valued for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to relieve pain and reduce swelling in the body. Herbal preparations of Cylindropuntia teres, such as tinctures and infusions, are often used to treat health issues like arthritis, fever, and gastrointestinal problems.
